summary: Final polish completed. research.md now has a <=250-word executive summary, explicit Q1-Q10 coverage, concrete child-spec names/scopes/efforts, and a resolved handoff: scaffold 002-009, implement 002-006 first, then expand parity through 007-008 and close release docs in 009.

Iteration 010 closes the loop by max-iteration stop condition plus finalized research.md and concrete implementation-cluster mapping. Remaining items are child-owned validation/runtime-capture gates, not research blockers.
